How old are you in 2026 if you were born in 2020?

Your age in 2026
5 or 6 years old

If you were born in 2020, you turn 6 in 2026. Before your birthday you are still 5.

🌍EventsCOVID-19 pandemic declared by WHO (Mar 11) · Kobe Bryant killed in helicopter crash (Jan 26) · George Floyd murdered; Black Lives Matter protests sweep US (May–Jun) · SpaceX launches first crewed mission from US soil since 2011 · Biden elected 46th US President (Nov 3) · COVID-19 vaccines approved; first shots given (Dec)
🎵MusicBlinding Lights – The Weeknd
🎬FilmBad Boys for Life
💻TechmRNA COVID-19 vaccines were developed and approved in record time
🛒PricesBread $1.67 · Gas $2.17/gal · House $296,900

How old am I if I was born in 2020?

If you were born in 2020, you are 5 years old for most of 2026, turning 6 once your birthday arrives. Your exact age depends on whether your birthday has already passed this year. Someone born on January 1, 2020 turns 6 on January 1, 2026, while someone born on December 31, 2020 only turns 6 on December 31, 2026. Use the age calculator above for your precise age down to the day. People born in 2020 have lived through 6 years of history and belong to the Generation Alpha generation.

What generation was born in 2020?

People born in 2020 belong to the Generation Alpha generation. This generation grew up during a unique period in history and witnessed major changes in technology, culture, and society. Use the calculator above to find your exact chronological age in years, months, weeks, and days.

Frequently asked questions

How old am I if I was born in 2020?

If you were born in 2020, you are 5 or 6 years old in 2026. You turn 6 on your birthday in 2026. Use the age calculator for your exact age to the day.

What day of the week was I born in 2020?

The day of the week depends on your specific birth date. Use the age calculator and enter your full date of birth to find out exactly which day of the week you were born.

How many days old am I if I was born in 2020?

Someone born on January 1, 2020 has lived approximately 2191 days as of January 1, 2026. Your exact number of days depends on your birth date. Enter your date of birth in the age calculator for the precise count.

What generation am I if I was born in 2020?

People born in 2020 belong to the Generation Alpha generation. Each generation is shaped by the historical events and cultural trends of their formative years.

Source U.S. Social Security Administration – Life Expectancy Calculator
